title: BLOSTM Heavy Duty Rubber Mallet - 16oz. Solid Rubber Mallet Hammer for Slabs, Bricklaying, Tent Pegs, Tiling, Paving Mallet - 32cm Rubber Hammer Mallet (Leaves no Marks) with Non-Slip Grip (16oz)
features: COMMERCIAL-GRADE - Tilers, builders, bricklayers, homeowners, ground pegs and outdoor travel enthusiasts love this compact 16 oz. rubber mallet. The handle is securely attached to the head for maximum safety.

ADVANCED DESIGN - Each 32 cm. rubber mallett is constructed with solid rubber. High-quality materials and manufacturing provide superior results and longer lasting use than other rubber mallets even after 1000s of repetitive tapping or fully weighted strikes.

WIDE RANGE OF USES - If you are looking for the best rubber mallet for slabs, general building, tiling, bricklaying, mechanical work, patio work, woodworking, automotive work, pitching up a tent with tent pegs or laying floor, look no further!
ERGONOMIC - This rubber hammer mallet is well made and specifically designed for comfort. The smooth, non-slip grip handle creates a safe working environment while reducing unnecessary hand fatigue.
COMPACT AND LIGHTWEIGHT - This reinforced high-density rubber mallet hammer is perfect for DIY projects, home use, and commercial work. Ideal for camping, traveling, toolbox, or on-the-go projects!
description: Product Description High Quality Materials Constructed with solid rubber, this mallet ensures superior results even after 1000s of repetitive tapping or fully weighted strikes. No Damage This rubber mallet is well made and specifically designed for comfort, whilst delivering all of the power without damaging your surfaces. Versatile Use this mallet for slabs, general building, tiling, bricklaying, mechanical work, patio work, woodworking, or pitching up a tent! BLOSTM Heavy Duty Rubber Mallet 16oz. A well made rubber mallet hammer is a necessity for builders, flooring specialists, tilers, bricklayers, homeowners, and even campers! Reinforced high-density rubber delivers all of the power without damaging surfaces. This mallet provides comfortable grip, promotes safety, and reduces hand fatigue. Solid, robust construction delivers a durable all-purpose rubber mallet.
